summary: Code quality refactoring regression test completed. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified working after refactoring: Dashboard 5 KPI cards with Net Profit, Market Mode full POS flow with extracted MarketModeWidgets component, Auto-Reorder page with extracted POTable component, Weekly Control MM/DD/YY date format, Historical page no future dates, Refill Trends page loads correctly.

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1x-1) - cosmetic only, charts render correctly

passed_tests: Backend: API root endpoint - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis returns net_profit - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/weekly-control returns MM/DD/YY formatted dates - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/refill-trends returns product trend data - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/market-mode/sessions/active - SUCCESS
Backend: Market Mode full flow (start, transaction, end) - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/historical no future dates - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/products - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/markets - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/reorder/suggestions - SUCCESS
Backend: GET /api/reorder/purchase-orders - SUCCESS
Backend: Owner login - SUCCESS
Backend: Invalid login returns 401 - SUCCESS
Frontend: Login with owner@grillshack.nz - SUCCESS
Frontend: Dashboard 5 KPI cards (Total Sales, Gross Profit, Net Profit, Avg COGS %, Total Sessions) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Market Mode page loads with session indicator - SUCCESS
Frontend: Market Mode start session, add product, CASH payment, transaction log - SUCCESS
Frontend: Market Mode uses extracted MarketModeWidgets component (TransactionLog, OrderSummary) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Auto-Reorder page loads with extracted POTable component - SUCCESS
Frontend: POTable shows print buttons, edit buttons, status update buttons - SUCCESS
Frontend: Weekly Control dates in MM/DD/YY (DayName) format - SUCCESS
Frontend: Historical page no future dates (Feb-Apr 2026 data only) - SUCCESS
Frontend: Refill Trends page loads with product cost overview - SUCCESS

code_quality_verification.xss_fix: ReorderPage.jsx printPO function uses safe DOM APIs (createElement, appendChild, textContent) - no document.write()
code_quality_verification.hardcoded_secrets_removed: test_phase_ab_features.py uses environment variables (TEST_OWNER_EMAIL, TEST_OWNER_PASSWORD) with fallback values
code_quality_verification.frontend_component_extraction: POTable.jsx and MarketModeWidgets.jsx components extracted and working
code_quality_verification.quickmode_deleted: QuickMode.jsx deleted, no remaining references in codebase

critical_code_review_comments: XSS vulnerability fixed - printPO now uses safe DOM manipulation instead of document.write()
Backend helper functions properly extracted and working (_format_date_display returns MM/DD/YY format)
Frontend components properly split - POTable and MarketModeWidgets are reusable
QuickMode.jsx correctly deleted - MarketMode.jsx is the replacement
seed_data_creation: Created test market session during Market Mode flow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Code quality refactoring verified. Key changes: (1) XSS fix in ReorderPage.jsx printPO - uses safe DOM APIs. (2) Backend helper functions extracted: _format_date_display, _accumulate_weekly, _format_week_row, _aggregate_market_txns, _create_auto_backup, _build_refill_product_trends, _finalize_refill_result. (3) Frontend components extracted: POTable.jsx (used in ReorderPage), MarketModeWidgets.jsx (TransactionLog, OrderSummary used in MarketMode). (4) QuickMode.jsx deleted - MarketMode.jsx is its replacement. (5) Test credentials use environment variables. All features working correctly after refactoring.
